response.text:
# REFLECTION

Household r1c4 is in critical distress: SoC at 33% (1 kWh of 3 kWh capacity) while islanded with a 1 kW load, yielding only ~1 hour of autonomy. All recent outbound sharing requests to r0c4, r1c3, and r2c4 have been rejected due to their own SoC constraints (all below 50% thresholds), indicating microgrid-wide scarcity and cascading depletion. No trust circles are established, eliminating preferential inbound channels. The repeated rejection pattern over the past 45 minutes suggests neighbors are locked in self-preservation mode and cannot be relied upon for inbound supply. With islanding active and no grid reconnection signal, r1c4 must immediately shift from outbound sharing to aggressive inbound requesting, suspend all outbound transfers to preserve the remaining 1 kWh, and signal maximum urgency to any peer capable of contributing. The microgrid appears to be in systemic collapse; survival depends on either grid reconnection or securing emergency inbound energy within the next 30–45 minutes.

```yaml
sharing_intent: conservative
share_min_soc_frac: 0.50
max_share_kw_per_tick: 0.0
recipient_priority: []
distrusted_peers: []
request_urgency: urgent
belief_note: "Microgrid-wide scarcity; all neighbors rejecting outbound requests due to own critical SoC. Islanded with 1 kWh remaining at 1 kW load = ~60 min autonomy. No trust circles established. Suspend all outbound sharing immediately; prioritize inbound requests with maximum urgency. Grid reconnection or emergency peer supply required within 30–45 min to avoid load shedding."
ttl_ticks: 30
```

system: You are the planning subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Given recent state, beliefs, and trust circles, output (1) a one-paragraph REFLECTION on what you've observed (just text), and (2) a POLICY in a YAML code-fence — sharing_intent (conservative|balanced|generous), share_min_soc_frac (0..1), max_share_kw_per_tick (kW), recipient_priority (list of {circle, weight}), distrusted_peers (list of house ids), request_urgency (low|normal|urgent), belief_note (string), ttl_ticks (int >= 1).
